arts.ttl: Why isn’t Dominik Szoboszlai playing for Liverpool against West Ham in the Premier League today?
arts.sum: Premier League rules state that players who receive five yellow cards at any point in their first 19 games are given a one-match suspension . In the league leaders’ home victory against Leicester City on December 26, Szoboszlai picked up his fifth yellow card of the Premier League campaign, incurring an immediate one-game suspension.

arts.ttl: West Ham manager in talks with David Sullivan regarding January transfers
arts.sum: West Ham United are reportedly hoping to sign a new striker when the transfer window reopens in January. They have struggled to score goals consistently and summer signing Niclas Fullkrug has struggled with persistent injury problems.
